Manages app order and storage, process commands, and loading processes from flash with mutex protection.


## Files
- **[app_order_storage.c](app_order_storage.c.md)**: Manages app order storage, including reading and writing app menu order files with mutex protection.
- **[app_order_storage.h](app_order_storage.h.md)**: Defines the AppMenuOrderStorage struct and functions for managing app order storage.
- **[app_storage.c](app_storage.c.md)**: Manages app storage operations, including loading, deleting, and checking app existence.
- **[app_storage.h](app_storage.h.md)**: Functions for managing and retrieving information about apps stored in SPI flash in 8 app banks.
- **[process_commands.c](process_commands.c.md)**: Serial commands for managing app processes, including remove, list, and launch functions.
- **[process_loader_flash.h](process_loader_flash.h.md)**: Function to load a process from flash memory using task, config, and metadata parameters.
- **[process_loader_storage.c](process_loader_storage.c.md)**: Manages loading and initialization of Pebble processes from flash or resources, including checksum verification and relocation handling.
